WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
BRAZIL-SOUTHEAST COAST.
DNC 01.
1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 21 JUN BY
   M/V ARTEMIS ANGLER TOWING SIX 160 METER LONG
   CABLES IN AREA BETWEEN
   24-51.0S 24-24.0S AND 042-24.6W 042-01.8W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1805/18.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 22 JUN 18.
